name: Don Burnside Park
description: Don Burnside Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Three Lakes, WI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Hodag Dome
description: Hodag Dome is a place to play pickleball in Rhinelander, WI. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Pioneer Park
description: Pioneer Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rhinelander, WI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Rhinelander School District JH Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Rhinelander School District JH Tennis Courts in Rhinelander, WI! There are 22 courts. 12 are outdoors and 10 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Three Lakes High School
description: Come play pickleball at Three Lakes High School in Three Lakes, WI! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: YMCA Of The Northwoods
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA Of The Northwoods in Rhinelander, WI! There are 5 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
